fb7d0b07aa44.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
fb7d0b07aa44.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
fb7d0b07aa44.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

07a4af1ed7c7.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
07a4af1ed7c7.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

0cb9911fa526.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
0cb9911fa526.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
0cb9911fa526.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

1d61d3088f53.title: Ranked #6 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
1d61d3088f53.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

d3926a08efd9.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
d3926a08efd9.description: You trail peers by 1.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
